channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Samsung Electronics Cuts U.S. Workforce by 739 Ahead of U.S. Headquarters Move
item.description:
Samsung Electronics America plans to cut 739 jobs in New Jersey as part of cost saving restructuring and ahead of moving its U.S. headquarters to Texas, offering relocation options for affected employees.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/business/samsung-electronics-739-job-cuts-us-relocation-texas-2026
